column1: # ZAP Rules Configuration for TwTxGNN (GitHub Pages)
# 以下項目因 GitHub Pages 無法設定 HTTP 回應標頭，降為 WARN

column3: (X-Frame-Options Header - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
(X-Content-Type-Options Header - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
(Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments - normal code comments)
(CSP Header Not Set on non-HTML resources - GitHub Pages limitation)
(CSP style-src/script-src unsafe-inline - required by just-the-docs theme)
(Strict-Transport-Security - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
(Permissions Policy Header - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
(Cross-Domain Misconfiguration - CORS controlled by GitHub CDN)
(Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
(Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy - GitHub Pages cannot set HTTP headers)
